div.p: Byte-by-byte layout with alignment, endianness, and field boundaries

ul.li: prev_lsn: Previous record in same transaction (0 = first)
length: Total record size including header + payload + CRC

div.p: Endianness: All multi-byte integers stored little-endian (x86/ARM native) Alignment: No padding in serialized form — fields are tightly packed Variable-length fields: Length-prefixed (4-byte length precedes data) String encoding: Raw bytes, NOT null-terminated Total length formula: 25 (header) + payload_size + 4 (CRC) LSN as offset: LSN equals byte offset in log file (enables O(1) record lookup)
